assertions.title: Squares are drawn from the predefined item pool

steps.action: Read the known item pool from src/lib/items.ts (45 items including center item)
steps.expected: Pool contains ~45 curated Theo moment strings
steps.observed: Pool contains 45 items (1 CENTER_ITEM + 44 others) in BINGO_ITEMS array

steps.action: Extract all 25 square texts from board (seed=testseed123) and compare against pool
steps.expected: All 25 texts match entries in the known pool
steps.observed: All 25 square texts match entries in BINGO_ITEMS pool. No garbage text, no placeholder strings like 'Item 1', no empty strings found.

steps.action: Verify across multiple seeds (alpha, beta)
steps.expected: All squares across all tested seeds match the pool
steps.observed: All square texts from seed=alpha and seed=beta boards also match entries in the BINGO_ITEMS pool

evidence.poolComparison: All 25 texts from seed=testseed123, seed=alpha, seed=beta verified against BINGO_ITEMS in src/lib/items.ts — all match known pool entries

assertions.title: Direct URL navigation to game page works

steps.expected: Page loads with a valid board, no redirect, no error, no blank page
steps.observed: Page loads successfully with title 't3ingo — Playing', URL remains /game?seed=hello42, board renders with 25 squares

steps.expected: No errors in console
steps.observed: No console errors

steps.observed: Board renders at 1440x900 with 25 squares

steps.expected: Board shows same squares in same positions
steps.observed: Board text is identical at 375x667 — all 25 squares have exactly the same text in exactly the same positions as desktop viewport

steps.action: Compare desktop and mobile board texts
steps.expected: Identical text arrays
steps.observed: Desktop and mobile board text arrays are exactly identical. Seed determinism holds across viewport sizes.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. Board generation is fully deterministic with seed-based PRNG. Center square always reads 'Gets nerdsniped'. All squares come from the known 45-item pool. Direct URL navigation works without errors. Seed determinism holds across viewport sizes (desktop 1440x900 and mobile 375x667).
